creator: Julie Bort
title: (No AI) ChatGPT finally offers $100/month Pro plan
dc:creator: Julie Bort
content: OpenAI announced on Thursday something that power users have been asking for: a $100/month plan. Previously, subscriptions jumped from $20 to $200 per month.
contentSnippet: OpenAI announced on Thursday something that power users have been asking for: a $100/month plan. Previously, subscriptions jumped from $20 to $200 per month.

creator: Lucas Ropek
title: (No AI) Florida AG announces investigation into OpenAI over shooting that allegedly involved ChatGPT
dc:creator: Lucas Ropek
content: ChatGPT had reportedly been used to plan the attack that killed two and injured five at Florida State University last April. The family of one victim has said that they plan to sue OpenAI over the incident.
contentSnippet: ChatGPT had reportedly been used to plan the attack that killed two and injured five at Florida State University last April. The family of one victim has said that they plan to sue OpenAI over the incident.

title: (No AI) ChatGPT has a new $100 per month Pro subscription
author: Jay Peters
content:
![Vector illustration of the Chat GPT logo.](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/chorus/uploads/chorus_asset/file/25462046/STK155_OPEN_AI_CVirginia_2_C.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

OpenAI has announced a new version of its ChatGPT Pro subscription that costs $100 per month. The new Pro tier offers "5x more" usage of its Codex coding tool than the $20 per month Plus subscription and "is best for longer, high-effort Codex sessions," [OpenAI says](https://x.com/OpenAI/status/2042295688323875316).

The company is introducing the new tier as it tries to win over users from Anthropic and its [popular Claude Code tool](https://www.theverge.com/report/874308/anthropic-claude-code-opus-hype-moment). ChatGPT's $100 per month option will directly compete with Anthropic's "Max" tier for Claude, which costs the same price. It also offers a middle ground between the $20 per month Plus tier and the $200 version of the Pro tier.

(Yes, there are now two tiers of " …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/909599/chatgpt-pro-subscription-new)
contentSnippet:
OpenAI has announced a new version of its ChatGPT Pro subscription that costs $100 per month. The new Pro tier offers "5x more" usage of its Codex coding tool than the $20 per month Plus subscription and "is best for longer, high-effort Codex sessions," OpenAI says.
The company is introducing the new tier as it tries to win over users from Anthropic and its popular Claude Code tool. ChatGPT's $100 per month option will directly compete with Anthropic's "Max" tier for Claude, which costs the same price. It also offers a middle ground between the $20 per month Plus tier and the $200 version of the Pro tier.
(Yes, there are now two tiers of " …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: (No AI) Florida launches investigation into OpenAI
author: Emma Roth
content:
![Vector illustration of the Open AI logo.](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2025/02/STK155_OPEN_AI_2025_CVirgiia_C.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

Florida Attorney General James Uthmeier is launching an investigation into OpenAI over public safety and national security risks, [as reported earlier by _Reuters_](https://www.reuters.com/business/florida-ag-probe-openai-chatgpt-2026-04-09/). In [a statement on Thursday](https://x.com/AGJamesUthmeier/status/2042258048115265541?s=20), Uthmeier says there are concerns that OpenAI's data and technology are "falling into the hands of America's enemies, such as the Chinese Communist Party."

Uthmeier also says that OpenAI's ChatGPT has been "linked to criminal behavior" related to child sexual abuse material and the "encouragement" of self-harm. He adds that ChatGPT may have been used to "assist" the person suspected of carrying out a shooting at Florida State University in April 2025. Thi …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/policy/909557/openai-florida-investigation)

He adds that ChatGPT may have been used to "assist" the person suspected of carrying out a shooting at Florida State University in April 2025. Thi …

creator: Maxwell Zeff
title: (No AI) OpenAI Backs Bill That Would Limit Liability for AI-Enabled Mass Deaths or Financial Disasters
dc:creator: Maxwell Zeff
content: The ChatGPT-maker testified in favor of an Illinois bill that would limit when AI labs can be held liable—even in cases where their products cause “critical harm.”
contentSnippet: The ChatGPT-maker testified in favor of an Illinois bill that would limit when AI labs can be held liable—even in cases where their products cause “critical harm.”

creator: Maxwell Zeff
title: (No AI) The 70-Person AI Image Startup Taking on Silicon Valley's Giants

content: Black Forest Labs has long punched above its weight in the AI image generation space. Its next move? Powering physical AI.
